headlines.description: Granada beat Athletic Bilbao 2-0 at home on Saturday on the opening day of the La Liga season.

headlines.description: Masip let a tame free kick from Roberto Lopez slip through his hands and over the line on the hour mark.
headlines.shortLinkText: Masip howler saves Sociedad against Valladolid

headlines.shortLinkText: Aspas double downs Valencia, Emery gets first

headlines.description: Real Betis continued their perfect start under new coach Manuel Pellegrini as they beat Real Valladolid 2-0 at home on Sunday.

headlines.description: Real Madrid played to a scoreless draw with Real Sociedad in their opening match of the La Liga season.

headlines.description: Real Madrid's offensive output continued to sputter as the La Liga champions mustered a 3-2 win against Real Betis on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Real Madrid beat Betis on Sergio Ramos' late VAR penalty

headlines.description: Luis Suarez had a stunning impact on his debut for Atletico Madrid on Sunday, scoring twice and providing an assist as his side crushed Granada 6-1
headlines.shortLinkText: Suarez scores two, provides assist on Atletico bow

headlines.description: Teenage forward Ansu Fati scored twice in Barcelona's opening La Liga game of the season.
headlines.shortLinkText: Fati stars in 4-0 win as Barca begin Koeman era

headlines.shortLinkText: Valencia beat Sociedad 1-0 with help from VAR

headlines.description: Atletico Madrid were unable to break down Huesca and had to settle for a 0-0 draw in their second game of the La Liga season on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Suarez, Atletico sputter in scoreless draw

headlines.description: Real Madrid defeated Real Valladolid 1-0 in La Liga action on Thursday, with Vinicius Jr. scoring for the hosts.
headlines.shortLinkText: Vinicius scores as Real Madrid beat Valladolid

headlines.description: Barcelona rode a goal from Ansu Fati and an inspired performance from Lionel Messi to a 3-0 win over Celta Vigo on Thursday night in La Liga.

headlines.description: Atletico Madrid drew 0-0 at home to Villarreal on Saturday in La Liga for a second consecutive goalless draw.

headlines.shortLinkText: Real Madrid go top of La Liga with win at Levante

headlines.shortLinkText: Dest debuts for Barcelona in draw with Sevilla

headlines.description: Luis Suarez and Yannick Carrasco scored early and late in the game to help Atletico Madrid to a 2-0 La Liga victory at Celta Vigo on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Suarez strike returns Atletico to winning ways

headlines.description: Real Madrid dropped their first game of the La Liga season with a 1-0 loss to newly promoted Cadiz on Saturday.

headlines.shortLinkText: Messi brace helps Barca to win vs. Real Betis

headlines.shortLinkText: Valencia sink Real Madrid with three Soler pens

headlines.description: Real Madrid were pegged back in the second half to draw 1-1 against Villarreal, having taken the lead through Mariano Diaz.

headlines.description: Atletico Madrid grabbed Diego Simeone's first win over Barcelona in La Liga on Saturday, with Yannick Carrasco's first-half goal the difference.
headlines.shortLinkText: Simeone finally gets 1st Liga win over Messi & Co.

headlines.description: La Liga leaders Real Sociedad were rewarded for their persistence as they eventually edged out Cadiz 1-0 away on Sunday to earn a sixth consecutive
headlines.shortLinkText: Real Sociedad notch sixth straight win to stay top of La Liga

headlines.description: Atletico Madrid were rewarded for their determination when they snatched a 1-0 win at Valencia thanks to a late own goal.
headlines.shortLinkText: Own goal gives dominant Atletico sixth straight La Liga win

headlines.description: Real Madrid slid to a shock 2-1 defeat at home to Alaves on Saturday as goalkeeper Thibaut Courtois made a catastrophic error.
headlines.shortLinkText: Real Madrid lose as Hazard suffers another injury

headlines.description: — Lionel Messi paid tribute to Diego Maradona by stripping off his Barcelona top to reveal the Argentina great's shirt after he scored the final goal of a 4-0 rout of Osasuna on Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Messi pays tribute to Maradona with shirt of Argentina great

headlines.description: La Liga leaders Real Sociedad's six-game winning streak ended on Sunday as they were held to a 1-1 draw at home to Villarreal.

headlines.description: Real Sociedad were unable to break down 10-man Alaves in a 0-0 draw on Sunday as they failed to return to the top of the La Liga standings.

headlines.shortLinkText: Real Madrid leapfrog Barca with Valencia win

headlines.description: Basement club Eibar earned a first La Liga win in 17 games on Saturday with a thumping 3-0 home victory over fellow strugglers Alaves.
headlines.shortLinkText: La Liga strugglers Eibar win first game since January

headlines.description: Atletico Madrid stayed in charge of La Liga's four-way title race by grinding out a 1-0 win at struggling Elche.
headlines.shortLinkText: Atletico ride luck to stay in charge of title race

headlines.description: Two late goals by Eder Militao and Casemiro gave Real Madrid a win over Osasuna to keep pace in the La Liga race.
headlines.shortLinkText: Real Madrid win to keep pace in La Liga race

headlines.description: Barcelona rode three second-half goals to a win over Valencia in La Liga on Sunday night to keep title hopes alive for Ronald Koeman's team.
headlines.shortLinkText: Messi brace keeps Barca alive in La Liga

headlines.description: Sevilla conceded a 90th-minute goal to fall to a 1-0 defeat at home to Athletic Bilbao on Monday, delivering a blow to their La Liga title hopes.
headlines.shortLinkText: Sevilla fade from title race with loss to Athletic

headlines.description: Atletico Madrid survived the challenge of Barcelona as the two sides played out a 0-0 draw at the Camp Nou in a crucial tie in the title race.
headlines.shortLinkText: Barca, Atletico draw in La Liga title showdown

headlines.description: Real Madrid benefited from a late own goal to get a 2-2 draw with Sevilla FC but couldn't leapfrog Atletico Madrid in the La Liga title race.
headlines.shortLinkText: Real Madrid snatch draw, stay behind Atletico

headlines.description: Barcelona squandered a golden opportunity to go top in La Liga with a 3-3 draw at Levante on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Barca flub chance to go top with Levante draw

headlines.description: A strike from Youssef En-Nesyri gave Sevilla a 1-0 home win over Valencia on Wednesday to keep alive their slim hopes in La Liga's title.
headlines.shortLinkText: Sevilla edge out Valencia to maintain slim title hopes

headlines.description: Atletico Madrid moved in on the La Liga title with a 2-1 win over Real Sociedad at the Wanda Metropolitano on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Atletico beat Sociedad to close on La Liga title

headlines.description: Real Madrid kept their La Liga hopes alive in their win against Granada on Thursday to keep pace with Atletico Madrid with two matches remaining.
headlines.shortLinkText: Real Madrid beat Granada, keep pace with Atletico

headlines.description: Real Madrid kept their La Liga title hopes alive with a 1-0 victory at Athletic Bilbao on Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Real keep title hopes alive with win at Athletic

headlines.description: Atletico Madrid took a giant step towards the La Liga title with a dramatic 2-1 comeback victory against Osasuna on Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Suarez winner puts Atletico on brink of title

headlines.description: Barcelona's hopes of winning La Liga ended as they suffered a shock 2-1 defeat against Celta Vigo on Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Barcelona's La Liga hopes end in shock defeat

headlines.description: Tiny Eibar's seven-year adventure in La Liga came to an end on Sunday when they were thrashed 4-1 away to Valencia.
headlines.shortLinkText: Eibar relegated from La Liga with defeat at Valencia

headlines.description: Carlos Bacca scored a hat-trick as Villarreal celebrated the return of supporters for the first time in over a year by thrashing Sevilla 4-0.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bacca bags hat-trick as Villarreal trounce Sevilla

headlines.description: Barcelona finished the season with a 1-0 win over already relegated Eibar as Antoine Griezmann scored the only goal of the game.
headlines.shortLinkText: Griezmann stunner earns Barca win over Eibar

headlines.description: Real Madrid came back from a goal down to beat Villarreal 2-1 on the final day of the La Liga season.
headlines.shortLinkText: Real Madrid beat Villarreal, lose title to Atletico

headlines.description: Atletico Madrid pipped city rivals Real Madrid to the La Liga title on Saturday after Luis Suarez fired them to a 2-1 win at Real Valladolid.
headlines.shortLinkText: Suarez winner clinches Atletico La Liga title
